title: plectronia neilgherrensis
intro: Plectronia neilgherrensis, also known as the Neilgherries plectronia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Western Ghats of India. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Plectronia neilgherrensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Plectronia neilgherrensis are often made into a decoction or infusion, which is used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
